content: An agent-orchestrated answering ensemble can be framed as a streaming experience processor for incremental competency mapping (ICM) training, where each specialized AI agent in the ensemble processes real-time streams of trainee performance data, offloading distinct competency assessment tasks via orchestration patterns (concurrent evaluation, sequential feedback refinement, handoff between specialized assessors) to update trainee competency maps continuously instead of requiring static batch revalidation. This creates a closed-loop system where generative AI agents can immediately synthesize streaming performance observations into personalized development plans aligned with ICM revalidation requirements.
source_topics: Streaming experience processing for ICM training
trigger_topic: Streaming experience processing for ICM training
